• Senior Robotics Research Control Engineer at Dyson
    2022.12 – present, 2 months | Hullavington, UK
    • Working on highly nonlinear system control for future robotics technology
  • Lab Software Engineer at University of Edinburgh
    2021.06 – 2022.09, 1 year 4 months | Edinburgh, UK
    • Researched whole-body dynamics MPC with footstep planning for legged robots
    • Collaborated on integration of whole-body dynamics MPC and Plane Seg for ANYmal
    • Collaborated on a ROS framework for centroidal dynamics footstep planner for Talos
    • Developed Vicon state estimation integration for legged robots: ANYmal and Talos
    • Researched control parameterization for whole-body dynamics MPC
    • Developed a ROS framework, a feedforward PD controller, and peripherals for Solo
    • Developed a generic software framework for legged robots
    • Taught ROS, ROS2, DevOps, and usages for various robots to lab members
    • Maintained various hardware platforms and wrote usages and setups
  • Robotics Research Engineer at ROBOTIS
    2018.04 – 2021.06, 3 year 3 months | Seoul, Korea
    • Developed ROS2 based hardware and user interfaces for a wheeled indoor delivery robot
    • Collaborated on a robot navigation system that can be used in buildings with elevators
    • Developed ROS2 applications for Turtlebot3
    • Developed ROS, ROS2 frameworks and applications for OpenManipulator-P/X
    • Implemented forward and inverse kinematics for manipulator robots with various structures: 6-axis articulated vertical, SCARA, Planar, Delta, Stewart and Linear
    • Designed manipulator robots with various structures using 3D CAD tools
    • Developed a ROS framework for RH Gripper
    • Developed ROS applications using open-source libraries: Navigation, Moveit, YOLO and KERAS
    • Developed a ROS framework for a biped robot
    • Implemented forward and inverse kinematics for bipedal robot legs with passive joints
    • Developed a ROS framework and user interfaces for a quadrupedal robot
    • Maintained robot software using tools such as Git, Travis, and Docker
  • Research Assistant at CARIS Laboratory, UBC
    2015.09 – 2017.12, 2 years 4 months | Vancouver, BC
    • Researched human-robot interaction using cues acquired from human-human haptic interaction during cooperative bimanual transport of a large object.
    • Conducted modeling of haptic cues from numerical data from experiments using Matlab.
    • Provided the impedance model of a human arm based on the haptic cues for the future development of a robot controller.
  • Teaching Assistant for MECH220S course, UBC
    2016.09 – 2016.12, 4 months | Vancouver, BC
    • Taught basic programming skills and Matlab.
    • Taught basic mechanical drawings and Solidworks.
  • Visiting Student Researcher at Visual Computing Research Centre, SIAT
    2015.04 – 2015.08, 5 months | Shenzhen, China
    • Developed an application for PR2 and enabled it to navigate and introduce the lab.
    • Acquired robot programming skills: ROS, C++, Python, Linux.
  • Research Assistant at Human and Environment Informatics Laboratory, UT Tokyo
    2014.10 – 2015.03, 5 months | Tokyo, Japan
    • Researched continuous blood-pressure monitoring systems and implemented a filter algorithm removing the influence of body movement from blood pressure.
  • Research Assistant at Micro Energy System Laboratory, UT Tokyo
    2014.04 – 2014.09, 5 months | Tokyo, Japan
    • Researched the synthetic jet theory and designed a small-sized cooler device
  • Project Assistant at Nakamura Laboratory, UT Tokyo
    2013.10 – 2013.12, 3 months | Tokyo, Japan
    • Collaborated on quadruped hardware design based on skeleton data of an actual dog
  • Project Assistant at Rally Car Race “Daruma” team, UT Tokyo
    2013.04 – 2014.03, 1 year | Tokyo, Japan
    • Collaborated on developing an android rally trip meter

For more information, please refer to my CV.
